ssml_content: <speak><prosody rate="fast">We have access to the entirety of human cinematic history, yet we spend more time <emphasis level="strong">choosing</emphasis> a movie than actually watching one.</prosody> You scroll through endless rows of colorful thumbnails, a digital purgatory of infinite choices. You add ten things to your watchlist, knowing deep down they will rot there for eternity. <break time="1s"/> You are not looking for entertainment anymore. You are searching for meaning in a sea of algorithms. <break time="2s"/> <prosody rate="slow">And then, you just rewatch the exact same sitcom you've seen five times. Why do we fear the new? Tell me your comfort show below.</prosody></speak>
